null, primary key (id_foto)) Hibernate: create table planetas (id_planeta bigint generated by default as identity, caracteristicas varchar(2000), comentarios varchar(2000), diametro float(53) not null, foto_logo LONGBLOB not null, masa float(53) not null, mime_type varchar(100) not null, nombre_identificatorio varchar(255) not null, id_usuario bigint not null, primary key (id_planeta)) Hibernate: create table planetasensimulaciones (id bigint generated by default as identity, angulo float(53) not null, nombre_planeta_simulacion varchar(100) not null, impulsos_non_gravity JSON, v float(53) not null, x float(53) not null, y float(53) not null, idplaneta bigint not null, idsimulacion bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table roles (id bigint generated by default as identity, nombre varchar(255) not null check (nombre in ('ROLE_ADMIN','ROLE_VISITANTE','ROLE_FISICO','ROLE_ASTRONOMO')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table simulaciones (id_simulacion bigint generated by default as identity, descripcion varchar(255), foto LONGBLOB not null, foto_preview LONGBLOB not null, mime_type varchar(255) not null, nombre varchar(255) not null, size bigint not null, idusuario bigint not null, primary key (id_simulacion)) Hibernate: create table usuarios (idusuario bigint generated by default as identity, apellido varchar(255) not null, deleted_at timestamp(6), email varchar(255) not null, foto LONGBLOB not null, mime_type varchar(255) not null, nombre varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, perfil_academico varchar(255), username varchar(255) not null, role_id bigint not null, primary key (idusuario)) Hibernate: alter table if exists roles drop constraint if exists UK_ldv0v52e0udsh2h1rs0r0gw1n Hibernate: alter table if exists roles add
